title: Talismans
description: Adds Talisman items that provide simple attribute buffs, a transmutation system, a new advancement tree, and more!
body:
![Banner consisting of the datapack title and author.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f72c6c4f0e8d07b26432a5af62e810940bdf30e.png)
### Enhance your survival playthrough with Talismans!
Talismans offers the simplicity of attribute-enhancing trinkets with the complexity of in-depth mechanics. Discover these ancient relics and learn to manipulate them to bring your strength to new heights!
___
![Banner serving as the header for the "Features" section.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34dc0a8f369c55aaf1f8bf81778f17b1036c44a2.png)
Talismans adds several new items and systems to the game, including:
- **Talisman** - a trinket that provides attribute buffs when equipped in the offhand. They contain an extractable "Core" than houses the effects and potency of the Talisman.
- **Omnislate** - a special trinket that can be combined with multiple Cores of the same level to create an item with multiple attribute bonuses.
- **Rune Cipher** - an ancient transmutation table used for transforming Talismans, Omnislates, and their components.
___
![Banner serving as the header for the "Transmutation" section.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6bc22f118d10855e3d80f5cde6c25ea4bb74ea3.png)
### Combine, split, and transform items!
The Rune Cipher provides a novel way to interact with Talismans. As a new and stylish block, it fits in with any crafting setup.
Rune Ciphers are very similar in design to Enchanting Tables, but don't be alarmed by their appearance; they are very easy to get in the early game as they only require Copper as opposed to Diamonds.
![About the Rune Cipher: a) Can take up to four compatible item inputs. b) Will transmute as many combinations as it can detect. c) Multiple can work simultaneously, and are multiplayer compatible. d) They make some very soothing noise :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5733f68706d057dd3f569e392ac948325d24871e_0.webp)
As the transmutation system may seem a little overwhelming, here's a quick guide that covers all the key points of transmutation in succinct detail:
![Transmutation Quick Guide: a) Rune Ciphers are blocks similar to Enchanting Tables. They can be crafted with 3 Obsidian along the bottom row, one Obsidian in the middle, and one Copper Block each to the right and left. b) Rune Splitters can separate items with multiple components. The can be crafted with one Polished Andesite block in the middle, with a Copper Ingot on all four sides. c) There are many combinations of items. Multiple transmutations can be done in tandem.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97305364c5630dac2dbf22751cf4071af8558d5d.png)
Note that certain features highlighted in this section may change as the datapack receives updates in the future.
___
![Banner serving as the header for the "Other Additions" section.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b94f0d75cdaf2118b697a58bd45ac30810d5a2bb.png)
- Updated Overworld loot tables containing Talismans, Omnislates, and Rune Splitters
- A new advancement tree to monitor progress

Add Talismans to your world to give it the extra progression it needs! If you have any questions, comments, or concerns, feel free to message **wisoven** on discord!
